---
title: "get_series_history"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_series_history()`

Get Series History

## Usage

```r
get_series_history(
  series_ticker,
  max_pages = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `series_ticker` | Character. The series ticker (e.g., "KXHIGHNY"). |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with all settled markets for the series.

## Description

Retrieves all historical results for a series, including all settled
events and their market outcomes. Useful for backtesting and analysis.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Get full history for NYC temperature series
history <- get_series_history("KXHIGHNY")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other history: 
`get_event_candlesticks()`,
`get_event_results()`,
`get_market_history()`,
`get_settled_events()`,
`get_settled_markets()`,
`get_trade_history()`
